title: Why Sell in  Sweden?
bodyHtml:
Why Sweden?

Want to sell more inventory, faster? We’ve made it easiest than ever to unlock the potential of the Swedish market: 

  • Market opportunity: We currently have fewer sellers listing their products in Sweden, but the refurbished electronics market is large and growing.
  • Category opportunity: You may be offering a product no other seller is offering to customers in Sweden, creating a higher likelihood of winning the BackBox and shifting your inventory, faster.
  • Fewer listings, less competition: 3 times less daily listings and competitor per BackBox compared to Finland and 6 times less daily listings and competitor per BackBox compared to France.
  • Higher out of stock %: 67% Out of Stock rate for top device categories compared to 1% in France, and 3% in Finland


Why open Sweden now? 

    Automated currency conversion

    Automatic currency conversion (EUR to SEK) is now available in your pricing rules  in the Back Office, meaning less risk of pricing errors and order cancellations

    The pricing rule is calculates SEK price = your primary market price x daily conversion rate (See example below) 
    Set and forget; the prices will be automatically converted every 24 hours 



     

    How to open your Swedish market

    1. First, your Seller Success Manager will activate your Swedish Market

    2. You will need to set your shipping method for Sweden in the Back Office 

    • Go to ‘Options’ 
    • Go to ‘Shipping’ 
    • Add your desired shipping settings for Sweden

    3. Your pricing rule will be automatically set to the SEK price = your primary market price x daily conversion rate. You can manually edit this rule by adding a ‘fixed amount’ for each listing, if desired.

    • Go to ‘Options
    • Go to “Pricing’ 
    • Add a ‘fixed amount’ if you wish to add a buffer to each listing price for shipping costs, for example


    FAQ

    Do I need to manually open the Swedish market?

    We (your SSM) will do this for you but you will have to add the shipping option yourselves. 


    What if we don’t want to be live in Sweden?

    You are not obliged to be live in Sweden and if you don’t activate it, it will remain closed. You can change your mind at any time and follow the instructions listed in this document.
     

    With the automatic currency conversion, can I still update prices manually? 

    Yes, you can do this as usual by updating your listing prices as normal and by deactivating our pricing rule. 
     

    How often will Swedish prices be converted?

    Every 24 hours to begin with however we are working on creating more frequent price updates soon.
     

    How will it work with my pricing software? 

    For now, we do not have an API endpoint supporting the currency conversion
